posts.text:
BREAKING: Vice President JD Vance has postponed his planned trip to Switzerland for US-Iran talks which were expected to begin on Friday, per Axios.

US officials reportedly say JD Vance's trip has been postponed due to Iranian claims regarding the situation in Lebanon.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
